spec.name: A Small Room
spec.description: Hmmm... this is an interesting little room. Ack, and there is an interesting little creature staring at you too. He looks a bit surprised at your intrusion. You can leave via the doors north or east, or you can stay and annoy him a bit more. There also appears to be some type of well down here also, but it has a rather secure grate covering it.

north.description: More of the hallway there... how exciting!

east.description: More of the hallway there... how exciting!

down.description: A ladder leads down into darkness.
